name: Intoxicating Pheromones
statusOutcome: With a sweet seductive smile, [AttackerName] massages [AttackerHisOrHer] heavy breasts in flaunting motions while letting out a cloud of tempting floral pheromones into the air! [TargetName], still high from the warm permeating aphrodisiacs, moves forward in an enchanted daze to breathe in more of the intoxicating fragrance, the enthralling scent sending a charming shiver through [TargetHisOrHer] brain!
statusMiss: With a sweet seductive smile, [AttackerName] massages her heavy breasts in pervertedly flaunting motions while letting out a concentrated cloud of tempting floral pheromones into the air, but [TargetName] manages to hold [TargetHisOrHer] breath and resist breathing in the enthralling scent!
